get.summary:
Usage: HBF-BOT ONLY
Requires hbf-lcm token
Gets all the requests of a specific end-user and status

Usage: HBF-BOT ONLY
Requires hbf-lcm token
Gets all the requests of a specific organization and status

Usage: All agent clients (ex. hbf-console)
Requires hbf-core token
Roles: HBF_ORG_LIVE_AGENT
Gets all the current authenticated agent's requests of a specific organization and status. The current user is determined by the hbf-core token

post.summary:
Usage: HBF-BOT ONLY
Requires hbf-lcm token
Creates a new request

Requires hbf-lcm token
Gets the conversations of an end-user based on their chatbricks id and status

head.summary:
Usage: All agent clients (ex. hbf-console)
Requires hbf-core token
Roles: HBF_ORG_LIVE_AGENT
Counts the conversations of an agent based on several criteria.

get.summary:
Usage: All agent clients (ex. hbf-console)
Requires hbf-core token
Roles: HBF_ORG_LIVE_AGENT
Gets the conversations of an agent based on several criteria. The client can decide the accept header type. If it is set to application/zip, conversations are fetched inside a zip as separate csv files that includes all their messages

Usage: All agent clients (ex. hbf-console)
Requires hbf-core token
Roles: HBF_ORG_LIVE_AGENT
Gets a single conversation

delete.summary:
Usage: Other systems like hbf-core or any data retention service
Requires hbf-lcm token
Purges all entities of an organization or tenant before the given date. This includes: Conversations, Participants, Messages, Notes and Attachments.

Usage: Other systems like hbf-core or any data retention service

info.title: Helvia.ai Livechat Manager
info.description: Livechat management service for the Helvia.ai Platform. Handles real-time routing of conversations between end-users and human agents when an AI agent escalates via a handover node. Supports multiple livechat providers including Zendesk, Cisco, Genesys, and Helvia's built-in livechat.
